name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_uvw_equipment_master_data_ie36
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_equipment_master_data_ie36' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`valid_from_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`valid_to_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`expiry_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`created_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modified_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modified_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Annual Inspection date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Compliance Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Major Structural Insp Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Modified FBT` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`valid_from_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`valid_to_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`expiry_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`created_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modified_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modified_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Annual Inspection date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Compliance Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Major Structural Insp Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Modified FBT` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'valid_from_date|valid_to_date|expiry_date|created_on|created_by|modified_on|modified_by|Annual Inspection date|Compliance Date|Major Structural Insp Date|Modified FBT' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`uvw_equipment_master_data_ie36`

data_array: valid_from_date|valid_to_date|expiry_date|created_on|created_by|modified_on|modified_by|Annual Inspection date|Compliance Date|Major Structural Insp Date|Modified FBT
